verse.name: v1
verse.lines: May the Lord Grant you peace May his love shine down, love shine down And meet, your every need And keep your feet from stumbling

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And fix your eyes on the mark, on the prize As you go may you rest in Christ Receive his grace to love all men In spite of all our differences

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: May your words be filled with life That crumble walls of fear and pride Take up the cross to serve the least and the lost As you go be the hands of God

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Cause He is your strength and your victory yeah He comes behind you and heals He is the cup and the portion your better and shield

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: So be released, Be blessed be free Live and move as the Spirit breathes As you go, Go with God, Go in peace
